  2. Aircraft sightings reports

Aircraft Sightings Reports

This page provides access to aircraft sightings reports generated from personal sightings records. Each entry includes a chart view and a downloadable data file; manufacturer reports lead to a separate report index.

Available Reports

Report View Download XLSX
Aircraft Manufacturer Reports View Reports —
Aircraft Type Trends Monthly View report Download data
Aircraft Type Trends Yearly View report Download data
Airline Aircraft Type Heatmap View report Download data
Manufacturer Aircraft Heatmap View report Download data
Manufacturer Popularity Counts View report Download data
Manufacturer Popularity Share View report Download data
Sightings Over Time Daily View report Download data
Sightings Over Time Monthly View report Download data
Sightings Over Time Yearly View report Download data
Top Aircraft Models Over Time View report Download data
Top Airlines Over Time Monthly View report Download data
Top Airlines Over Time Yearly View report Download data
Top Manufacturers Over Time View report Download data
Top Routes Bidirectional View report Download data
Top Routes Unidirectional View report Download data

These reports are generated from the author's own aircraft sightings records over time.

Cite this dataset

You are welcome to reuse or reproduce this material but please cite the dataset using the reference below.

Walker, David. Aircraft Sightings Reports. Field Notes. ID FN-AC. Version 2026.03.15. http://localhost:4000/aircraft/

Dataset FN-AC Author David Walker Publisher Field Notes Version 2026.03.15

BibTeX 
@dataset{fn_ac,
  author = {Walker, David},
  title = {Aircraft Sightings Reports},
  year = {2026},
  publisher = {Field Notes},
  version = {2026.03.15},
  url = {http://localhost:4000/aircraft/}
}
